title: Dry Bulk Segments
summary:
Main
By Michalis Voutsinas
In a notable departure from the same period last year, the twenty-fifth trading week concluded with a far more subdued tone, particularly across the larger dry bulk segments. Exactly one year ago, the BDI hovered just below 2,000 points, capping off a week of positive sentiment. Capesizes led the charge, averaging $26,059 per day - a 6.3 percent weekly gain - while Supramax and Handysize earnings were also trending higher.
